name: Board Game Club
overview: Board Game Club is one of the main series on the No Rolls Barred YouTube channel in which the cast play various board games as a group.  No Rolls Barred is all about showing YOU just how much fun board gaming can be! It is similar to the Tabletop web series created by Wil Wheaton and Felicia Day which ran for several seasons on the Geek & Sundry YouTube channel.

trailers.title: Let's Play FOR SALE | Board Game Club
